title: UpdateItemInput
description: UpdateItemInput schema from Amazon DynamoDB API

TableName.description: The name of the table containing the item to update

Key.description: The primary key of the item to be updated

UpdateExpression.description: An expression that defines attributes to be updated

ConditionExpression.description: A condition that must be satisfied for the update to succeed

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: Substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ExpressionAttributeValues.description: Values that can be substituted in an expression

ReturnValues.description: Determines the return values after the operation
